summary: Partial frontend testing completed for SOIN collaborative development platform. Successfully verified basic workspace loading and component presence, but encountered critical session management issues preventing comprehensive feature testing.

critical_bugs.issue: User sessions expire rapidly and redirect to login page during testing
critical_bugs.impact: Prevents comprehensive testing of workspace features - user gets logged out every few minutes

integration_issues.issue: Authentication token not persisting properly, causing frequent logouts

passed_tests: Login API functionality (backend responds correctly with token)
Workspace component rendering (file tree, code editor, chat panel)
Code editor shows file content with syntax highlighting

success_percentage.frontend: 30% (basic loading works, but session management prevents full testing)

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix session management/authentication token persistence issue. Users are getting logged out every few minutes, preventing proper testing of workspace features. Once this is fixed, comprehensive testing of all features (file operations, code editing, AI interactions, run functionality) can be completed.
